tasks.title: Add Buy Credits nav placeholder
tasks.objective: Add a visible Buy Credits navigation entry that leads to a safe placeholder until real credit purchases are implemented.
authority: Add navigation affordance only; do not implement payment or grant credits.
Make placeholder state explicit so users do not think checkout is live.
Keep the route ready to be replaced or extended by T013.
acceptance_criteria: Primary navigation includes a visible Buy Credits entry.
The Buy Credits entry routes to a placeholder page or state without performing purchases.
Placeholder copy clearly indicates payment is not wired yet.
Existing navigation remains usable on desktop and mobile layouts.
Tests cover the nav entry and placeholder response.
verification: Run `npm run check` before issue closeout.
Browser smoke test the nav item if UI changes are implemented.
tasks.stop_condition: Stop when the placeholder nav path exists and cannot create or grant credits.
tasks.evidence: 2026-06-16: Added a shared topbar with `Buy Credits`, routed `/credits/buy` to a clear non-payment placeholder, verified focused route/navigation tests, and browser-smoked the nav click on localhost:3002.
